title: Section 198
content: Whenever 1[2[the Corporation]] decides to acquire any immovable property for the purpose of this Act, the Commissioner shall acquire such property on behalf of 1[2[the Corporation]] by agreement on such terms and at such price as may be approved by the Standing Committee.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
